title: Hope is Gone
description:
See also

Об игреHope is Gone is a first-person action horror game with a retro art style.

You play as Zoe, an ordinary woman who has made many mistakes in the past. Zoe takes a bus to go to the hospital where her husband is hospitalized, but falls asleep. When she wakes up, she is in a totally decadent and dark parallel dimension. The beings of this world hate humans and will do anything to capture Zoe and any other human.Survival-horror: The inhabitants of this decadent world will come after you, fight to defend yourself or run away to save resources. Don't get lost. Stay alert.Explore: This decadent world is very different from ours, explore the environments to find routes to your destination and look for items that will help you survive.Discover: There are many secrets hidden in this strange world. In fact, there are also many dark secrets in Zoe's past. Discover the secrets and understand your destiny.
description_short: A retro-style first-person horror game set in a dark, decaying parallel dimension where people from our world are not welcome.
